description: Phase 14a re-analysis: localized entropy (NOT computable), grid oracle accuracy and ceiling captures, entropy threshold documentation.

task1_entropy_auc.LOCALIZATION_NOTE: Per-token logprob arrays were NOT stored during Phase 13 sampling (only the mean_token_entropy scalar per sample was saved). True final-20-token localized entropy is NOT computable from existing data. Mean-entropy AUC below uses the stored scalar and replicates the Phase 14a value.

Qwen2.5-7B.interpretation: AUC = P(signal_backfire > signal_gain). Higher signal = predict backfire. AUC > 0.5: backfire problems have higher entropy.

Llama-3-8B.interpretation: AUC = P(signal_backfire > signal_gain). Higher signal = predict backfire. AUC > 0.5: backfire problems have higher entropy.

localized_entropy_auc.reason: per-token logprob arrays not stored in Phase 13 sampling

Qwen2.5-7B.NOTE_baseline: ceiling_captured uses the binary oracle (max of MV_acc(1), MV_acc(64)) and MV_acc(64) as fixed baseline, as defined in Phase 13 pre-registration. See task2_grid_oracle for ceiling captures vs the grid oracle.

Llama-3-8B.NOTE_baseline: ceiling_captured uses the binary oracle (max of MV_acc(1), MV_acc(64)) and MV_acc(64) as fixed baseline, as defined in Phase 13 pre-registration. See task2_grid_oracle for ceiling captures vs the grid oracle.
